description: NativeClaw cron schedule. The bridge reads this on startup and checks every 60 seconds.

crons.name: morning-brief
crons.prompt: Good morning. Check the user's calendar for today, check for any urgent emails, and send a morning briefing via bash $HOME/.claude/scripts/telegram_direct.sh "[briefing text]"

crons.name: end-of-day-summary
crons.prompt: End of day. Read today's daily log from memory/. Summarize what was accomplished, what's still open, and what's coming tomorrow. Send via bash $HOME/.claude/scripts/telegram_direct.sh "[summary]"

crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Heartbeat check. Read HEARTBEAT.md for instructions. Only alert the user if something needs attention. Quiet hours: 10 PM - 6 AM — skip during quiet hours.

crons.name: task-queue-recovery
crons.prompt: TASK QUEUE RECOVERY. Read $HOME/.claude/workspace/system/task-queue/queue.json. If any tasks have status 'pending' or 'rate-limited': attempt them now. Update status in queue.json. retryCount >= 5 = 'failed'. Do NOT message the user.
